MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-06-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT. 2; HERBERT DONALDSON, JUDGE; V.T.INVENTADO, CLERK; M. LYON, CSR. C/C IN DEPT. 1 & TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 2 FOR SETTLE- MENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF & THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION ENTERED ON THE RECORD: 1. RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 519 ELLIS ST. #617, SF; 2. BACK RENTS FOR $1,458.16 & COSTS FOR $113.00; 3. PERSONAL PROPERTY IN THE PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED; 4. EACH PARTY WAIVES ANY CAUSE OF ACTION ONE PARTY MAY HAVE AGAINST THE OTHER; 5. LEASE IS FORFEITED; 6. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED UNTIL OCTOBER 21, L997.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMUDEZ, RAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 519 ELLIS ST, #617, SF $1,571.16 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,571.16, LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED UNTIL 10/21/97; SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
